title: Titles, Canonicals, Robots Directives, Hreflang, and Structured Metadata · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs titles, canonicals, robots directives, hreflang, and structured metadata from revision, authorization, seed, URL, policy, response bytes, parsed identity, record provenance, frontier transition, Promise settlement, browser state, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for evidence-linked indexing and metadata audit after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Audit title and description presence, uniqueness, length evidence, visible consistency, and stakeholder intent without ranking promises.
Resolve canonical links and reconcile redirects, sitemap URLs, internal links, content identity, and scope before reporting conflicts.
Parse robots meta and X-Robots-Tag directives by agent, precedence, response, and scope while keeping crawl and index policy distinct.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Jsonld Admission
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 7210 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile title, canonical, robots directives, hreflang graphs, JSON-LD, and explicit search non-claims; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then reorder one frontier, p-limit, Promise, AbortSignal, stream, retry, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Parse bounded JSON-LD as untrusted data, validate known shapes, preserve unknowns, and avoid eligibility or ranking claims.
